Metadata.title: GCopy - Sync text screenshot & file
Metadata.description: A clipboard synchronization web service for different devices that can synchronize text, screenshots, and files.

Notice.title: Notice
Notice.shareClipboard: Click Allow when the browser asks you if it can See text and images copied to the clipboard.
Notice.protectPrivacy: GCopy protects your privacy data by temporarily storing your latest clipboard data in memory only. GCopy does not persist your clipboard data.

Email.title: Sign in
Email.subTitle: Support for text, screenshots & file synchronization.
Email.tip: Your privacy is important to GCopy!
Email.sendEmailFailed: Failed to send email. Please check and retry.
Email.codeSubTitle: We emailed a code to {email}. Please enter the code to sign in.
Email.incorrectCode: Incorrect code. Please go back and retry.
Email.authenticationFailed: Authentication failed. Please go back and retry.

TokenLogin.title: Token Login
TokenLogin.generateSubTitle: Generate a token for clipboard sync
TokenLogin.verifySubTitle: Enter an existing token to access shared clipboard
TokenLogin.caseSensitive: Letters are case-sensitive (uppercase and lowercase are different).
TokenLogin.invalidToken: Invalid token. Please check and retry.
TokenLogin.generateFailed: Failed to generate token. Please retry.
TokenLogin.verifyFailed: Failed to verify token. Please retry.

SyncClipboard.title: Sync the clipboard
SyncClipboard.subTitle: Press the button and the clipboard synced between devices.

syncFile.title: Sync the files
syncFile.subTitle: Choose a file and sync it between different devices.
syncFile.dragDropTip: Drag and drop a file here

quickInput.title: Quick input
quickInput.subTitle: Type text, press the button and the text synced between devices.

history.title: History
history.subTitle: Stored only locally on the browser and can be deleted at any time.

logs.pressToSync: Press the button to sync clipboard 👉
logs.readClipboardSuccess: Read data from the clipboard successfully.
logs.writeSuccess: Written data to the clipboard successfully.
logs.autoDownload: File download should start shortly. if not, please click the file link below.
logs.fileTooLarge: File size ({size} MiB) exceeds the maximum limit ({limit} MiB).
logs.pressAgain: Press again due to browser security policies 👉
logs.pressPaste: If the "Paste" appears, press it to allow reading the clipboard.
logs.readQuickInputSuccess: Read text from quick input area successfully.
logs.pinLimit: Up to 10 items can be pinned.
